summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 8D-Opus Reklamationsmanagement app. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All pages load correctly after fixing empty LanguageSwitch.js component. Fixed MongoDB projection error in /api/v1/reviews/queue endpoint.

minor.issue: MongoDB projection error - FIXED by removing mixed inclusion/exclusion in $project stage

issues: WebSocket connection fails (expected in preview environment) - falls back to polling correctly

critical_code_review_comments: LanguageSwitch.js was empty (0 bytes) causing React render error - FIXED
MongoDB $project stage in review_endpoints.py had mixed inclusion/exclusion which is invalid - FIXED
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 3 sample complaints on startup: BMW AG (RK-2026-0001), Daimler AG (RK-2026-0002), Volkswagen AG (RK-2026-0003)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core functionality working. Backend APIs tested via pytest. Frontend pages tested via Playwright: Dashboard, Reklamationen list, Complaint detail with D1-D8 tabs, Review-Queue, Auswertungen. German characters (ä, ü, ö, ß) render correctly. GÜHRING branding displays properly.

backend_tests.health_check: PASS - /api/health returns status ok with database connected
backend_tests.complaints_list: PASS - /api/v1/complaints returns 3+ seeded complaints (BMW AG, Daimler AG, Volkswagen AG)

frontend_tests.dashboard_load: PASS - Dashboard loads with stats cards, charts, recent complaints
frontend_tests.guhring_header: PASS - GÜHRING text renders correctly (not escaped unicode)
frontend_tests.complaints_list: PASS - Shows 3+ complaints with correct data
frontend_tests.complaint_detail: PASS - Loads with D1-D8 tabs, team data visible
frontend_tests.review_queue: PASS - Loads without errors, shows empty state
